## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedConfectionBase class

Mutable wrapper base class for IProducedConfection with undo/redo support. Provides common editing methods and history management.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare abstract class RuntimeProducedConfectionBase<T extends AnyProducedConfection> 
```

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RuntimeProducedConfectionBase` class.

[restoreSnapshot(snapshot)](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimeproducedconfectionbase.restoresnapshot.md)

[scaleToYield(yieldSpec)](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimeproducedconfectionbase.scaletoyield.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

Scales to a new yield specification. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

Note: This method updates the yield in the confection data. Actual filling scaling must be handled at a higher level (e.g., in sessions) where the filling library is accessible.


</td></tr>
